description_long: This is a roughly spherical, hand-crafted ceramic vase with a wide, uneven mouth and a bulbous body. The surface is matte and heavily textured, showing signs of age and weathering, with a mottled coloration ranging from gray to light brown. The rim is irregular and slightly chipped, suggesting it has seen significant use or exposure. The body is asymmetrical, with one side appearing more flattened and the base subtly indented, allowing it to rest stably on flat surfaces. There are no visible handles or decorative embellishments, giving it a utilitarian, rustic appearance. The interior is hollow, suitable for holding water, plants, or other contents.
description: A weathered, bulbous ceramic vase with a wide, uneven mouth and a rough, matte surface in gray and brown tones. Its asymmetrical, rustic form suggests age and utilitarian use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, chipped mouth and the rounded, slightly flattened body with a mottled gray surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the asymmetrical bulge and the sloping, uneven rim, with the base tilting slightly.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the most flattened side of the vase and the subtle indentation at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the smoother curve of the body and the consistent rough texture.
